creator: ed@FreeBSD.org
text:
A new version of the uriparser port is available. Bump it to the latest
version. While there, also update my maintainer email address.

Fix: 

--- net/uriparser/Makefile
+++ net/uriparser/Makefile
@@ -1,16 +1,16 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	uriparser
 # Date Created:				31 Mar 2007
-# Whom:					Ed Schouten <ed@fxq.nl>
+# Whom:					Ed Schouten <ed@FreeBSD.org>
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/net/uriparser/Makefile,v 1.8 2008/02/12 21:41:03 miwi Exp $
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	uriparser
-PORTVERSION=	0.6.3
+PORTVERSION=	0.7.1
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 
-MAINTAINER=	ed@fxq.nl
+MAINTAINER=	ed@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	URI parsing library
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
--- net/uriparser/distinfo
+++ net/uriparser/distinfo
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (uriparser-0.6.3.tar.bz2) = 59bbc64d7ac897a35fc63d7ab5eefffc
-SHA256 (uriparser-0.6.3.tar.bz2) = f863fdf98225040c3a9364b6b01c12256f25d684d8709828e9e6422ce5edf09f
-SIZE (uriparser-0.6.3.tar.bz2) = 380668
+MD5 (uriparser-0.7.1.tar.bz2) = 2de0ae2ed08b779bfb32867133fdb662
+SHA256 (uriparser-0.7.1.tar.bz2) = 3cd5329a851ebbb0e2c93f74d4fc2a5cf55a21cec0cf23e65b81f3df0f8606e6
+SIZE (uriparser-0.7.1.tar.bz2) = 409452
